problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Quantum annealing for optimization problems may resolve How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
